assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} needs to sort 5/3, 7/4, and 2/1 in order from smallest to biggest, can they convert them to a common denominator and order them correctly?

description.it: Associare una frazione a una divisione e calcolare l'equivalente decimale di frazioni semplici (per esempio 3/8 = 0,375); ricordare e utilizzare le equivalenze tra frazioni semplici, numeri decimali e percentuali in contesti diversi
description.en: Associate a fraction with division and calculate decimal fraction equivalents for simple fractions (e.g. 3/8 = 0.375); recall and use equivalences between simple fractions, decimals, and percentages in different contexts

evidence.it: Trasformare 3/8 in 0,375 eseguendo la divisione 3 ÷ 8
evidence.en: Convert 3/8 to 0.375 by dividing 3 ÷ 8

evidence.it: Sapere a memoria che 1/5 = 0,2 = 20%
evidence.en: State that 1/5 = 0.2 = 20% from memory

evidence.it: Usare le equivalenze tra frazioni, decimali e percentuali per confrontare 30%, 1/3 e 0,35 e metterli in ordine
evidence.en: Use fraction–decimal–percentage equivalences to compare 30%, 1/3, and 0.35 and put them in order

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} sees 3/8 written on a worksheet, can they convert it to a decimal — and also say roughly what percentage that is?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} sees 3/8 written on a worksheet, can they convert it to a decimal — and also say roughly what percentage that is?

description.it: Interpretare e calcolare la divisione di un numero intero per una frazione unitaria (per esempio 4 ÷ 1/5 = 20); usare modelli visivi e il legame tra moltiplicazione e divisione per spiegare perché il quoziente è più grande del dividendo
description.en: Interpret and compute division of a whole number by a unit fraction (e.g. 4 ÷ 1/5 = 20); use visual models and the relationship between multiplication and division to explain why the quotient is larger than the dividend

evidence.it: Calcolare 4 ÷ (1/5) = 20 e spiegare: 'Quanti quinti servono per formare 4 intere?'
evidence.en: Compute 4 ÷ (1/5) = 20 and explain: 'How many fifths fit in 4 wholes?'

evidence.it: Inventare un problema con un contesto reale per 6 ÷ (1/4) e risolverlo
evidence.en: Create a story context for 6 ÷ (1/4) and solve it

evidence.it: Verificare che 4 ÷ (1/5) = 20 mostrando che 20 × (1/5) = 4
evidence.en: Verify 4 ÷ (1/5) = 20 by showing 20 × (1/5) = 4

assessmentPrompt.it: If you have 4 metres of ribbon and each bow needs 1/5 of a metre, can {{name}} work out how many bows you can make — and explain why the answer is bigger than 4?
assessmentPrompt.en: If you have 4 metres of ribbon and each bow needs 1/5 of a metre, can {{name}} work out how many bows you can make — and explain why the answer is bigger than 4?

name.it: Dividere frazioni unitarie e numeri interi
name.en: Dividing unit fractions and whole numbers

description.it: Risolvere problemi della vita quotidiana che riguardano la divisione di frazioni unitarie per numeri interi e di numeri interi per frazioni unitarie, usando modelli visivi ed equazioni
description.en: Solve real-world problems involving division of unit fractions by whole numbers and whole numbers by unit fractions, using visual models and equations

evidence.it: Risolvere: '3 persone si dividono in parti uguali 1/2 kg di cioccolato: quanto riceve ciascuno?' (1/6 kg)
evidence.en: Solve: '3 people share 1/2 lb of chocolate equally — how much each?' (1/6 lb)

evidence.it: Risolvere: 'Quante porzioni da 1/3 di tazza si possono ricavare da 2 tazze di uvetta?' (6 porzioni)
evidence.en: Solve: 'How many 1/3-cup servings in 2 cups of raisins?' (6 servings)

evidence.it: Inventare una situazione concreta che corrisponda a una data espressione di divisione con frazioni unitarie
evidence.en: Create a story context for a given unit-fraction division expression

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} has half a pizza to share equally among 3 people, can they work out what fraction of the whole pizza each person gets — and explain the steps they took?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} has half a pizza to share equally among 3 people, can they work out what fraction of the whole pizza each person gets — and explain the steps they took?

description.it: Risolvere problemi con l'addizione e la sottrazione di frazioni con denominatori diversi, usando modelli visivi e frazioni di riferimento per stimare e verificare la ragionevolezza del risultato
description.en: Solve word problems involving addition and subtraction of fractions with unlike denominators, using visual models and benchmark fractions to estimate and assess reasonableness

evidence.it: Risolvere: 'Tara ha mangiato 2/5 di una pizza e Sam ne ha mangiata 1/3. Quanta pizza hanno mangiato in tutto?'
evidence.en: Solve: 'Tara ate 2/5 of a pizza and Sam ate 1/3. How much did they eat together?'

evidence.it: Capire che 2/5 + 1/2 non può essere uguale a 3/7, perché 3/7 è minore di 1/2, mentre la somma dovrebbe essere maggiore di 1/2
evidence.en: Recognise that 2/5 + 1/2 ≠ 3/7 because 3/7 < 1/2 but the sum should exceed 1/2

evidence.it: Stimare la somma di due frazioni usando dei valori di riferimento (0, 1/2, 1) prima di calcolarla in modo esatto
evidence.en: Estimate a fraction sum using benchmarks (0, 1/2, 1) before computing exactly

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} walks 1 and 1/2 miles to school and 3/4 of a mile to a friend's house, can they work out the total distance — and check whether their answer makes sense?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} walks 1 and 1/2 miles to school and 3/4 of a mile to a friend's house, can they work out the total distance — and check whether their answer makes sense?

name.it: La moltiplicazione come cambiamento di scala

description.it: Interpretare la moltiplicazione come un modo per ingrandire o ridurre (cambiare scala): confrontare la grandezza di un prodotto con quella di un fattore in base alla grandezza dell'altro fattore, senza fare calcoli; spiegare l'effetto di moltiplicare per frazioni maggiori, uguali o minori di 1
description.en: Interpret multiplication as scaling (resizing): compare the size of a product to a factor based on the size of the other factor without computing; explain the effect of multiplying by fractions greater than, equal to, or less than 1

evidence.it: Prevedere, senza calcolare, se 3/4 × 7 è maggiore o minore di 7
evidence.en: Predict without calculating whether 3/4 × 7 is greater or less than 7

evidence.it: Spiegare perché moltiplicare per 5/3 rende un numero più grande, mentre moltiplicare per 2/5 lo rende più piccolo
evidence.en: Explain why multiplying by 5/3 makes a number larger and multiplying by 2/5 makes it smaller

evidence.it: Collegare la moltiplicazione di a/b per n/n = 1 al principio dell'equivalenza tra frazioni
evidence.en: Relate multiplying a/b by n/n = 1 to the principle of fraction equivalence

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} multiplies 20 by 1/4, can they predict whether the answer will be bigger or smaller than 20 — and explain why, before doing the calculation?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} multiplies 20 by 1/4, can they predict whether the answer will be bigger or smaller than 20 — and explain why, before doing the calculation?

name.it: Moltiplicazione di frazioni in situazioni reali

description.it: Risolvere problemi della vita quotidiana che richiedono la moltiplicazione tra frazioni e numeri misti, usando modelli visivi delle frazioni o equazioni
description.en: Solve real-world problems involving multiplication of fractions and mixed numbers, using visual fraction models or equations

evidence.it: Risolvere: 'Una ricetta richiede 2 e 1/3 tazze di farina; vuoi preparare 1 e 1/2 dosi. Quanta farina ti serve?'
evidence.en: Solve: 'A recipe needs 2 1/3 cups of flour; you want to make 1 1/2 batches. How much flour?'

evidence.it: Disegnare un modello con le frazioni per rappresentare e risolvere un problema di moltiplicazione
evidence.en: Draw a fraction model to represent and solve a multiplication word problem

evidence.it: Verificare se il risultato di una moltiplicazione tra frazioni è plausibile nel contesto, usando la stima
evidence.en: Check the reasonableness of a fraction product in context using estimation

assessmentPrompt.it: If a recipe makes 12 biscuits using 1 and 1/2 cups of sugar, and {{name}} wants to make only 2/3 of the recipe, can they work out how much sugar they need?
assessmentPrompt.en: If a recipe makes 12 biscuits using 1 and 1/2 cups of sugar, and {{name}} wants to make only 2/3 of the recipe, can they work out how much sugar they need?

description.it: Saper lavorare in modo interscambiabile con i numeri decimali finiti e le corrispondenti frazioni (per esempio 3,5 e 7/2, oppure 0,375 e 3/8); convertire con sicurezza dall'una all'altra forma
description.en: Work interchangeably with terminating decimals and their corresponding fractions (such as 3.5 and 7/2 or 0.375 and 3/8); convert fluently between the two forms

evidence.it: Convertire un qualsiasi numero decimale finito nella frazione corrispondente, ridotta ai minimi termini
evidence.en: Convert any terminating decimal to a fraction in simplest form

evidence.it: Convertire in numero decimale finito una qualsiasi frazione il cui denominatore abbia come fattori primi solo 2 e 5
evidence.en: Convert any fraction with a denominator whose prime factors are only 2 and 5 to a terminating decimal

evidence.it: Spiegare perché alcune frazioni danno origine a numeri decimali finiti mentre altre no
evidence.en: Explain why some fractions produce terminating decimals and others do not

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} sees 0.375 on a calculator display, can they convert it to a fraction in its simplest form — without using the calculator?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} sees 0.375 on a calculator display, can they convert it to a fraction in its simplest form — without using the calculator?

description.it: Utilizzare le quattro operazioni con metodi scritti formali applicati a numeri interi, decimali, frazioni proprie e improprie e numeri misti, sia positivi che negativi
description.en: Use the four operations with formal written methods applied to integers, decimals, proper and improper fractions, and mixed numbers, all both positive and negative

evidence.it: Addizionare, sottrarre, moltiplicare e dividere con numeri interi positivi e negativi
evidence.en: Add, subtract, multiply, and divide with positive and negative integers

evidence.it: Applicare metodi scritti formali a calcoli con numeri decimali di qualsiasi grandezza, ad esempio 12,75 + 3,4
evidence.en: Apply formal written methods to calculations with decimals of any size

evidence.it: Eseguire tutte le quattro operazioni con frazioni proprie, frazioni improprie e numeri misti
evidence.en: Perform all four operations with proper fractions, improper fractions, and mixed numbers

assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} needs to work out −1/2 + 3/4 − 1 and 1/4 as part of a longer problem, can they do it using written methods — showing each step clearly?

description.it: Interpretare frazioni e percentuali come operatori: trovare la frazione o la percentuale di una quantità moltiplicando, comprendendo che 'di' significa moltiplicare (ad esempio, 3/4 di 200 = 3/4 × 200 = 150)

evidence.it: Calcolare la frazione di una quantità data moltiplicando
evidence.en: Calculate a fraction of a given amount by multiplying

evidence.en: Calculate a percentage of a given amount by converting to a decimal and multiplying

evidence.it: Usare l'interpretazione della frazione come operatore per risolvere problemi a più passaggi che coinvolgono sconti, tasse e porzioni
evidence.en: Use the operator interpretation to solve multi-step problems involving discounts, taxes, and portions

assessmentPrompt.it: If a £120 jacket is reduced by 35%, can {{name}} work out the sale price — by first calculating 35% of £120 and then subtracting?
assessmentPrompt.en: If a £120 jacket is reduced by 35%, can {{name}} work out the sale price — by first calculating 35% of £120 and then subtracting?

description.en: Model shapes by building from components (e.g. sticks and clay balls) and by drawing

evidence.it: Disegna un rettangolo riconoscibile
evidence.en: Draw a recognisable rectangle

evidence.it: Costruisce un cubo usando cannucce e giunture
evidence.en: Construct a cube from straws and connectors

assessmentPrompt.it: Can {{name}} build or draw a shape they've been shown — for example, making a cube from folded paper or copying a triangle onto dot paper?
assessmentPrompt.en: Can {{name}} build or draw a shape they've been shown — for example, making a cube from folded paper or copying a triangle onto dot paper?

description.en: Compose simple shapes to form larger shapes (e.g. two triangles make a rectangle)

evidence.en: Use pattern blocks to fill a hexagon outline

assessmentPrompt.en: Can {{name}} fit smaller shapes together to make bigger ones — like combining two triangles to make a rectangle?

assessmentPrompt.en: Does {{name}} understand the difference between a flat shape like a square and a solid shape like a cube — and can they sort everyday objects into flat or solid?

assessmentPrompt.en: Can {{name}} look at a 3-D shape and name the 2-D shapes on its faces — for example, saying a cylinder has circles on the ends and a rectangle wrapped round the side?

evidence.it: Descrivere una forma tridimensionale composita indicando le forme semplici che la compongono

assessmentPrompt.en: Can {{name}} combine 3-D shapes — like stacking cubes and cylinders — to build a new composite solid?

evidence.en: Decompose a composite shape and describe which simpler shapes make it up

assessmentPrompt.en: Can {{name}} use flat shapes like triangles and rectangles to fit together and make a new larger shape — like a puzzle?

description.it: Identificare e descrivere le proprietà delle figure solide, tra cui il numero di spigoli, vertici e facce

evidence.en: Describe a 3-D shape by its properties (e.g. a cube has 6 faces, 12 edges, 8 vertices)

assessmentPrompt.en: Can {{name}} count the faces, edges, and vertices of a 3-D shape like a cube or triangular prism?

description.it: Ordinare e disporre combinazioni di oggetti matematici seguendo regolarità e sequenze
description.en: Order and arrange combinations of mathematical objects in patterns and sequences

evidence.en: Continue a repeating pattern of shapes or colours

evidence.en: Describe the rule for a given sequence of objects

evidence.en: Create own patterns and sequences using mathematical objects

assessmentPrompt.it: Can {{name}} spot a repeating pattern made of shapes or objects and continue it, or create their own repeating pattern?
assessmentPrompt.en: Can {{name}} spot a repeating pattern made of shapes or objects and continue it, or create their own repeating pattern?

description.it: Confrontare e classificare le più comuni figure piane (2D) e solide (3D), così come gli oggetti di uso quotidiano, in base alle loro proprietà
description.en: Compare and sort common 2-D and 3-D shapes and everyday objects by their properties

evidence.it: Spiegare i criteri usati per classificare un gruppo di figure
evidence.en: Explain criteria used to sort a group of shapes

assessmentPrompt.it: Can {{name}} sort a collection of shapes into groups — for example, separating all the shapes with curved sides from those with only straight sides?
assessmentPrompt.en: Can {{name}} sort a collection of shapes into groups — for example, separating all the shapes with curved sides from those with only straight sides?

description.it: Disegnare figure piane e costruire solidi con materiali da modellare; riconoscere i solidi in orientamenti diversi e saperli descrivere
description.en: Draw 2-D shapes and make 3-D shapes using modelling materials; recognise 3-D shapes in different orientations and describe them

evidence.en: Recognise a 3-D shape (e.g. a pyramid) when it is rotated or seen from a different angle

assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} is given a cube to look at, can they draw it on paper — and then make a cube-shaped model from modelling clay or construction materials?

description.it: Riconoscere, disegnare e interpretare gli sviluppi piani delle principali figure solide — cubi, parallelepipedi, prismi a base triangolare e piramidi a base quadrata — prevedendo quale solido si otterrà piegando una determinata disposizione di facce, verificando se uno sviluppo si chiude correttamente e disegnando lo sviluppo a partire da una descrizione o da un modello concreto; comprendere la relazione tra il numero di facce e la struttura dello sviluppo.

evidence.en: Identify which of several given nets will fold into a specific 3-D shape and explain why the others won't

assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} is given a flat T-shaped piece of card with six squares, can they tell you — before folding — that it makes a cube, and point out which square will become each face?

assessmentPrompt.it: If you show {{name}} a flat architect's sketch of a box or a pyramid, can they tell you the name of the 3-D shape it represents?
assessmentPrompt.en: If you show {{name}} a flat architect's sketch of a box or a pyramid, can they tell you the name of the 3-D shape it represents?

description.it: Sapere che gli angoli attorno a un punto misurano in totale 360° (un giro completo), che gli angoli su una linea retta misurano in totale 180° e che gli angoli opposti al vertice sono uguali; usare queste proprietà per trovare angoli mancanti
description.en: Know that angles at a point sum to 360° (one whole turn), angles on a straight line sum to 180°, and vertically opposite angles are equal; use these facts to find missing angles

evidence.en: Identify 270° as three right angles

assessmentPrompt.en: If three angles meet at a point and two of them are 120° and 95°, can {{name}} work out the third angle — knowing all the angles at a point add up to 360°?

evidence.en: Measure an angle with a protractor and read 47°

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} is given a protractor and an angle drawn on paper, can they measure it accurately and then draw a new angle of a size you specify?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} is given a protractor and an angle drawn on paper, can they measure it accurately and then draw a new angle of a size you specify?

description.it: Riconoscere che la misura degli angoli è additiva; trovare angoli incogniti aggiungendo o sottraendo valori su una figura, usando equazioni con un simbolo per l'incognita
description.en: Recognise angle measure as additive; find unknown angles by adding or subtracting on a diagram using equations with a symbol for the unknown

evidence.it: Due angoli su una linea retta misurano 65° e x°; trovare x = 115°
evidence.en: Two angles on a straight line are 65° and x°; find x = 115°

evidence.it: Un angolo è scomposto in due parti di 35° e 40°; indicare che l'angolo intero misura 75°
evidence.en: An angle is decomposed into 35° and 40°; state the whole angle is 75°

evidence.it: Risolvere: gli angoli attorno a un punto misurano 120°, 90° e x°; trovare x = 150°
evidence.en: Solve: angles at a point are 120°, 90°, and x°; find x = 150°

assessmentPrompt.it: If two angles sit next to each other on a straight line and one is 65°, can {{name}} work out the other angle — knowing that angles on a straight line always add up to 180°?
assessmentPrompt.en: If two angles sit next to each other on a straight line and one is 65°, can {{name}} work out the other angle — knowing that angles on a straight line always add up to 180°?

description.it: Utilizzare le proprietà dei rettangoli per dedurre informazioni collegate e trovare lunghezze e angoli mancanti
description.en: Use the properties of rectangles to deduce related facts and find missing lengths and angles

evidence.it: Sapendo che un lato di un rettangolo misura 8 cm e il perimetro è 28 cm, trovare l'altro lato
evidence.en: Given one side of a rectangle is 8 cm and the perimeter is 28 cm, find the other side

evidence.it: Spiegare che tutti gli angoli di un rettangolo sono di 90°
evidence.en: Explain that all angles in a rectangle are 90°

evidence.it: Trovare il lato mancante di un rettangolo conoscendo l'area e la misura di un lato
evidence.en: Find a missing side of a rectangle given its area and one side length

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} knows one side of a rectangular garden is 7 m, can they tell you the length of the opposite side and all four corner angles — without measuring?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} knows one side of a rectangular garden is 7 m, can they tell you the length of the opposite side and all four corner angles — without measuring?

description.it: Disegnare figure geometriche piane utilizzando le misure e gli angoli indicati, usando riga e goniometro in modo preciso
description.en: Draw 2-D shapes using given dimensions and angles, using a ruler and protractor accurately

evidence.it: Disegnare un triangolo con lati di 5 cm e 7 cm e un angolo compreso di 60°
evidence.en: Draw a triangle with sides 5 cm, 7 cm and an included angle of 60°

evidence.it: Costruire un rettangolo con lunghezza e larghezza date, usando riga e squadra
evidence.en: Construct a rectangle with given length and width using a ruler and set square

evidence.it: Disegnare un pentagono regolare conoscendo la lunghezza del lato e l'ampiezza dell'angolo interno
evidence.en: Draw a regular pentagon given the side length and interior angle

assessmentPrompt.it: If you ask {{name}} to draw a triangle with sides of 5 cm and 7 cm with a 40° angle between them, can they use a ruler and protractor to draw it accurately?
assessmentPrompt.en: If you ask {{name}} to draw a triangle with sides of 5 cm and 7 cm with a 40° angle between them, can they use a ruler and protractor to draw it accurately?

description.it: Riconoscere, descrivere e costruire semplici solidi geometrici, anche realizzando i loro sviluppi piani (le reti)
description.en: Recognise, describe, and build simple 3-D shapes, including making nets

evidence.it: Individuare quale sviluppo piano, una volta piegato, forma un determinato solido
evidence.en: Identify which net will fold into a given 3-D shape

evidence.it: Costruire lo sviluppo piano di un prisma a base triangolare e piegarlo per verificarne la forma
evidence.en: Construct the net of a triangular prism and fold it to verify

evidence.it: Descrivere un solido geometrico indicando le sue facce, i suoi spigoli e i suoi vertici
evidence.en: Describe a 3-D shape by naming its faces, edges, and vertices

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} is given a flat cross-shaped piece of card (a net), can they predict what 3-D shape it will make when folded up — and then fold it to check?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} is given a flat cross-shaped piece of card (a net), can they predict what 3-D shape it will make when folded up — and then fold it to check?

description.it: Trovare angoli incogniti in triangoli, quadrilateri e poligoni regolari utilizzando le proprietà della somma degli angoli
description.en: Find unknown angles in triangles, quadrilaterals, and regular polygons using angle sum properties

evidence.it: Trovare un angolo mancante in un triangolo conoscendo due angoli (usando la somma degli angoli = 180°)
evidence.en: Find a missing angle in a triangle given two angles (using angle sum = 180°)

evidence.it: Calcolare un angolo mancante in un quadrilatero (somma degli angoli = 360°)
evidence.en: Calculate a missing angle in a quadrilateral (angle sum = 360°)

evidence.it: Calcolare l'angolo interno di un esagono regolare a partire dalla formula della somma degli angoli
evidence.en: Calculate the interior angle of a regular hexagon from the angle sum formula

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} knows that angles in a triangle always add up to 180°, and two angles in a triangle are 55° and 70°, can they work out the third angle without measuring it?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} knows that angles in a triangle always add up to 180°, and two angles in a triangle are 55° and 70°, can they work out the third angle without measuring it?

description.it: Riconoscere gli angoli quando si incontrano in un punto, si trovano su una linea retta oppure sono opposti al vertice; trovare angoli mancanti utilizzando queste proprietà
description.en: Recognise angles where they meet at a point, are on a straight line, or are vertically opposite; find missing angles using these properties

evidence.it: Trovare un angolo mancante in un punto conoscendo gli altri angoli (somma totale 360°)
evidence.en: Find a missing angle at a point given the other angles (total 360°)

evidence.it: Utilizzare la proprietà della linea retta (gli angoli hanno somma 180°) per trovare un angolo incognito
evidence.en: Use the straight-line property (angles sum to 180°) to find an unknown angle

evidence.it: Individuare gli angoli opposti al vertice e usare la proprietà secondo cui sono uguali per trovare gli angoli incogniti
evidence.en: Identify vertically opposite angles and use the property that they are equal to find unknowns

assessmentPrompt.it: If two straight lines cross each other, can {{name}} tell you which pairs of angles are equal (vertically opposite) — and find a missing angle if you give them one of the others?
assessmentPrompt.en: If two straight lines cross each other, can {{name}} tell you which pairs of angles are equal (vertically opposite) — and find a missing angle if you give them one of the others?

description.it: Utilizzare le proprietà di facce, superfici, spigoli e vertici dei solidi (cubi, parallelepipedi, prismi, cilindri, piramidi, coni e sfere) per risolvere problemi, incluso il saper visualizzare le sezioni
description.en: Use the properties of faces, surfaces, edges, and vertices of 3-D shapes (cubes, cuboids, prisms, cylinders, pyramids, cones, and spheres) to solve problems, including visualising cross-sections

evidence.it: Contare e descrivere facce, spigoli e vertici di un prisma triangolare e di una piramide a base quadrata
evidence.en: Count and describe the faces, edges, and vertices of a triangular prism and a square-based pyramid

evidence.it: Descrivere la sezione 2D ottenuta tagliando orizzontalmente un cilindro o verticalmente un cono
evidence.en: Describe the 2-D cross-section produced by slicing a cylinder horizontally or a cone vertically

evidence.it: Utilizzare le proprietà dei solidi per stabilire se un determinato sviluppo piano può essere ripiegato a formare un solido specifico
evidence.en: Use properties of 3-D shapes to determine whether a given net will fold into a specified solid

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} slices a cylinder straight across the middle like cutting a tin of beans in half, can they describe the shape of the cut surface? What about slicing at an angle?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} slices a cylinder straight across the middle like cutting a tin of beans in half, can they describe the shape of the cut surface? What about slicing at an angle?

name.it: Somma degli angoli nei triangoli e nei poligoni
name.en: Angle sums in triangles and polygons

description.it: Ricavare e utilizzare la somma degli angoli interni di un triangolo (180°), usarla per dedurre la somma degli angoli interni in un poligono qualsiasi ((n−2) × 180°) e calcolare gli angoli interni ed esterni dei poligoni regolari
description.en: Derive and use the angle sum in a triangle (180°), use it to deduce the angle sum in any polygon ((n−2) × 180°), and calculate interior and exterior angles of regular polygons

evidence.it: Calcolare un angolo mancante in un triangolo sottraendo da 180° gli angoli noti
evidence.en: Calculate a missing angle in a triangle by subtracting the known angles from 180°

evidence.it: Trovare la somma degli angoli interni di un esagono dividendolo in triangoli
evidence.en: Find the sum of interior angles in a hexagon by dividing it into triangles

evidence.it: Calcolare ciascun angolo interno ed esterno di un poligono regolare conoscendo il numero dei lati
evidence.en: Calculate each interior and exterior angle of a regular polygon given the number of sides

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} knows two angles of a triangle are 50° and 70°, can they work out the third? And can they figure out the angles inside a regular pentagon?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} knows two angles of a triangle are 50° and 70°, can they work out the third? And can they figure out the angles inside a regular pentagon?

description.it: Disegnare e misurare con precisione segmenti e angoli utilizzando riga e goniometro, e interpretare disegni in scala per ricavare le misure reali
description.en: Draw and measure line segments and angles accurately using ruler and protractor, and interpret scale drawings to extract real measurements

evidence.it: Disegnare con precisione un triangolo conoscendo due lati e l'angolo tra essi compreso (criterio LAL)
evidence.en: Draw a triangle accurately given two sides and the included angle (SAS)

evidence.it: Misurare gli angoli di una figura geometrica con l'aiuto del goniometro, con precisione di un grado
evidence.en: Measure angles in a geometric figure to the nearest degree using a protractor

evidence.it: Leggere un disegno in scala per determinare le lunghezze reali, spiegando la scala utilizzata
evidence.en: Read a scale drawing to determine actual lengths, explaining the scale used

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} is given an architect's floor plan where 1 cm represents 2 m, can they measure a room on the plan and work out its real-world dimensions?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} is given an architect's floor plan where 1 cm represents 2 m, can they measure a room on the plan and work out its real-world dimensions?

description.it: Applicare le proprietà degli angoli intorno a un punto (360°), degli angoli su una retta (180°) e degli angoli opposti al vertice per trovare angoli incogniti in problemi articolati su più passaggi
description.en: Apply the properties of angles at a point (360°), on a straight line (180°), and vertically opposite angles to find unknown angles in multi-step problems

evidence.it: Trovare un angolo mancante utilizzando il fatto che gli angoli su una retta hanno somma 180°
evidence.en: Find a missing angle using the fact that angles on a straight line sum to 180°

evidence.it: Utilizzare l'uguaglianza degli angoli opposti al vertice per impostare e risolvere un'equazione per trovare un angolo incognito
evidence.en: Use vertically opposite angles are equal to set up and solve an equation for an unknown

evidence.it: Combinare più proprietà degli angoli in una stessa figura per trovare, passo dopo passo, diversi angoli mancanti
evidence.en: Combine multiple angle facts in a single diagram to find several missing angles step by step

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} is given a diagram with several angles marked at crossing lines and some unknown, can they use the rules about straight lines and crossing lines to find all the missing angles step by step?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} is given a diagram with several angles marked at crossing lines and some unknown, can they use the rules about straight lines and crossing lines to find all the missing angles step by step?

description.it: Conoscere e utilizzare i criteri di congruenza dei triangoli (LLL, LAL, ALA, LLA con angolo retto), usare le convenzioni standard per indicare lati e angoli del triangolo ABC, e stabilire se due triangoli sono congruenti
description.en: Know and use the criteria for triangle congruence (SSS, SAS, ASA, RHS), use standard labelling conventions for sides and angles of triangle ABC, and determine whether two triangles are congruent

evidence.it: Indicare quale criterio di congruenza (LLL, LAL, ALA o LLA con angolo retto) si applica a una determinata coppia di triangoli
evidence.en: State which congruence criterion (SSS, SAS, ASA, or RHS) applies to a given pair of triangles

evidence.it: Usare la notazione △ABC ≅ △DEF per individuare lati e angoli corrispondenti
evidence.en: Use the notation △ABC ≅ △DEF and match corresponding sides and angles

evidence.it: Stabilire se le misure date determinano un triangolo unico, più di un triangolo, oppure nessun triangolo
evidence.en: Determine whether given measurements produce a unique triangle, more than one, or none

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} is shown two triangles where all three sides of one match all three sides of the other, can they explain why those triangles must be identical in shape and size?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} is shown two triangles where all three sides of one match all three sides of the other, can they explain why those triangles must be identical in shape and size?

description.it: Comprendere e utilizzare le relazioni tra rette parallele tagliate da una trasversale: angoli corrispondenti, angoli alterni interni e angoli coniugati interni (dallo stesso lato); usare queste relazioni per trovare angoli incogniti.
description.en: Understand and use the relationship between parallel lines cut by a transversal: corresponding angles, alternate interior angles, and co-interior (same-side interior) angles; use these to find unknown angles

evidence.it: Individuare in una figura con rette parallele le coppie di angoli alterni, corrispondenti e coniugati interni
evidence.en: Identify alternate, corresponding, and co-interior angle pairs in a diagram with parallel lines

evidence.it: Spiegare perché gli angoli alterni sono congruenti utilizzando il concetto di traslazione lungo la trasversale
evidence.en: Explain why alternate angles are equal using the concept of translation along the transversal

evidence.it: Trovare gli angoli mancanti in una figura con rette parallele combinando le diverse relazioni tra angoli
evidence.en: Find missing angles in a parallel-line diagram using a combination of angle relationships

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} sees a Z-shape or F-shape formed by two parallel lines and a crossing line in a diagram, can they identify the equal angles and explain why they’re equal?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} sees a Z-shape or F-shape formed by two parallel lines and a crossing line in a diagram, can they identify the equal angles and explain why they’re equal?

description.it: Usare riga e compasso per eseguire le costruzioni geometriche fondamentali: la mediana perpendicolare (asse) di un segmento, la perpendicolare a una retta da un punto o in un punto dato, e la bisettrice di un angolo
description.en: Use ruler and compasses to perform standard constructions: perpendicular bisector of a line segment, perpendicular to a line from or at a given point, and bisecting an angle

evidence.it: Costruire l'asse (mediana perpendicolare) di un segmento usando compasso e riga
evidence.en: Construct the perpendicular bisector of a line segment using compasses and a straight edge

evidence.it: Costruire la bisettrice di un angolo e verificarne la correttezza misurando le due metà
evidence.en: Construct an angle bisector and verify by measuring both halves

evidence.it: Costruire la perpendicolare da un punto a una retta usando solo il compasso
evidence.en: Construct a perpendicular from a point to a line using compasses only

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} has only a ruler and a pair of compasses, can they construct a line that cuts another line segment exactly in half at a right angle — without using a protractor?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} has only a ruler and a pair of compasses, can they construct a line that cuts another line segment exactly in half at a right angle — without using a protractor?

description.it: Usare i rapporti trigonometrici seno, coseno e tangente nei triangoli rettangoli per trovare lati e angoli incogniti, individuando il rapporto giusto da applicare in ogni problema
description.en: Use the trigonometric ratios sin, cos, and tan in right-angled triangles to find unknown sides and angles, including setting up the correct ratio for a given problem

evidence.it: Individuare quale rapporto trigonometrico usare (SOH CAH TOA) in base ai lati noti e a quello da trovare
evidence.en: Identify which trigonometric ratio to use (SOH CAH TOA) based on the known and unknown sides

evidence.it: Calcolare un lato incognito usando seno, coseno o tangente insieme a un angolo noto
evidence.en: Calculate an unknown side using sin, cos, or tan and a known angle

evidence.it: Trovare un angolo incognito usando la funzione trigonometrica inversa (ad esempio arctan)
evidence.en: Find an unknown angle using the inverse trigonometric function (e.g. tan⁻¹)

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} knows a ladder is 5 metres long and leans against a wall at 70° to the ground, can they use trigonometry to work out how high up the wall it reaches?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} knows a ladder is 5 metres long and leans against a wall at 70° to the ground, can they use trigonometry to work out how high up the wall it reaches?

description.it: Applicare il Teorema di Pitagora (a² + b² = c²) per calcolare la lunghezza di lati incogniti nei triangoli rettangoli, anche in contesti reali e nella geometria delle coordinate
description.en: Apply Pythagoras’ Theorem (a² + b² = c²) to calculate unknown side lengths in right-angled triangles, including in real-world and coordinate-geometry contexts

evidence.it: Calcolare l'ipotenusa di un triangolo rettangolo conoscendo i due cateti
evidence.en: Calculate the hypotenuse of a right-angled triangle given the two shorter sides

evidence.it: Trovare un cateto conoscendo l'ipotenusa e l'altro cateto
evidence.en: Find a shorter side given the hypotenuse and the other short side

evidence.it: Usare il Teorema di Pitagora per calcolare la distanza tra due punti su un piano cartesiano
evidence.en: Use Pythagoras’ Theorem to find the distance between two points on a coordinate grid

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} wants to check whether a shelf bracket makes a perfect right angle and the sides measure 30 cm, 40 cm, and 50 cm, can they use Pythagoras to verify?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} wants to check whether a shelf bracket makes a perfect right angle and the sides measure 30 cm, 40 cm, and 50 cm, can they use Pythagoras to verify?

description.it: Usare con cura le parole matematiche quando si contano e si confrontano quantità e quando si descrivono forme e posizioni
description.en: Use mathematical words carefully when counting, comparing, and describing shapes and positions

evidence.it: Usa correttamente 'più di', 'meno di' e 'uguale a' quando confronta gruppi di oggetti
evidence.en: Use 'more than', 'fewer than', and 'the same as' correctly when comparing groups

evidence.it: Riconosce e nomina correttamente le forme, descrivendone le caratteristiche con parole come 'lati' e 'angoli'
evidence.en: Name shapes correctly and describe their features using words like 'sides' and 'corners'

evidence.it: Usa con precisione le parole di posizione (sopra, sotto, vicino a) per descrivere dove si trovano gli oggetti
evidence.en: Use positional words (above, below, next to) precisely to describe where objects are

assessmentPrompt.it: When {{name}} talks about maths — like comparing numbers or describing shapes — do they use the right words, like "larger than", "fewer", "beside", or "corner"?
assessmentPrompt.en: When {{name}} talks about maths — like comparing numbers or describing shapes — do they use the right words, like "larger than", "fewer", "beside", or "corner"?

description.it: Notare quando un calcolo o uno schema si ripete e usare questa osservazione per contare in modo più efficiente o prevedere i risultati
description.en: Notice when a calculation or pattern repeats and use this to count more efficiently or predict results

evidence.it: Notare che il conteggio a salti di 2 segue uno schema che si ripete tra numeri pari e dispari
evidence.en: Notice that skip counting by 2s follows a repeating odd/even pattern

evidence.it: Riconoscere che aggiungendo 1 a un numero qualsiasi si ottiene sempre il numero successivo nel conteggio
evidence.en: Recognise that adding 1 to any number always gives the next counting number

evidence.it: Usare uno schema ripetuto (per esempio, +10 sulla tavola dei numeri fa sempre scendere di una riga) per prevedere i risultati
evidence.en: Use a repeated pattern (e.g. +10 on a hundred chart always moves down one row) to predict answers

assessmentPrompt.it: When {{name}} is counting or doing repeated additions, have they started to notice the pattern — like "5, 10, 15, 20…" — and used it to predict the next number without counting one by one?
assessmentPrompt.en: When {{name}} is counting or doing repeated additions, have they started to notice the pattern — like "5, 10, 15, 20…" — and used it to predict the next number without counting one by one?

description.it: Scegliere e utilizzare strumenti conosciuti (oggetti concreti, dita, tabelle del dieci) come supporto per risolvere un problema matematico
description.en: Select and use familiar tools (concrete objects, fingers, ten frames) to help solve a mathematical problem

evidence.it: Scegliere cubetti, contatori o le dita come aiuto per risolvere un problema di addizione o sottrazione
evidence.en: Choose cubes, counters, or fingers to help solve an addition or subtraction problem

evidence.it: Utilizzare una tabella del dieci per organizzare gli oggetti da contare o confrontare
evidence.en: Use a ten frame to organise objects for counting or comparing

evidence.it: Spiegare perché è stato scelto un determinato strumento (ad esempio i cubetti invece delle dita) per risolvere un problema
evidence.en: Explain why a particular tool (e.g. cubes rather than fingers) was chosen for a given problem

assessmentPrompt.it: When {{name}} is working out a maths problem, do they reach for helpful tools — like using their fingers, counters, or a number line — to support their thinking?
assessmentPrompt.en: When {{name}} is working out a maths problem, do they reach for helpful tools — like using their fingers, counters, or a number line — to support their thinking?

description.it: Capire un problema individuando che cosa viene chiesto, scegliendo oggetti concreti o disegni per rappresentare la situazione, e spiegando il percorso seguito per arrivare alla soluzione
description.en: Make sense of a problem by identifying what is being asked, choosing concrete objects or pictures to represent the situation, and explaining a pathway to the solution

evidence.it: Di fronte a un problema con numeri entro il 10, spiega con parole proprie cosa chiede il problema prima di provare a risolverlo
evidence.en: When given a word problem within 10, explain what the problem is asking before attempting to solve

evidence.it: Sceglie oggetti, le dita o disegni per rappresentare la situazione del problema
evidence.en: Choose objects, fingers, or drawings to represent a problem situation

evidence.it: Dopo aver trovato una risposta, controlla che abbia senso (ad esempio ricontando gli oggetti per verificare il totale)
evidence.en: After finding an answer, check it makes sense (e.g. re-count objects to verify a total)

assessmentPrompt.it: When {{name}} gets a maths problem they don't immediately know how to solve, do they stop and think about what the question is asking — maybe drawing a picture — before diving in?
assessmentPrompt.en: When {{name}} gets a maths problem they don't immediately know how to solve, do they stop and think about what the question is asking — maybe drawing a picture — before diving in?

description.it: Passare da una situazione reale a una rappresentazione matematica usando oggetti concreti, disegni, diagrammi, tabelle, espressioni numeriche o modelli a barre
description.en: Move between a real-world situation and a mathematical representation using concrete objects, drawings, diagrams, tables, number sentences, or bar models

evidence.it: Data una storia che parla di unire gruppi di oggetti, rappresentarla con gettoni o cubetti e trovare il totale
evidence.en: Given a story about combining groups, represent it with counters or cubes and find the total

evidence.it: Dato un insieme di oggetti, inventare una semplice storia di addizione o sottrazione che lo descriva
evidence.en: Given a set of objects, tell a simple addition or subtraction story to match

evidence.it: Collegare un'azione concreta (mettere insieme, togliere) all'operazione matematica corrispondente
evidence.en: Connect a physical action (putting together, taking away) to the matching operation

assessmentPrompt.it: If {{name}} is working out a real-life maths problem — like sharing 8 sweets between 2 people — can they use objects or draw a picture to show what's happening before writing any numbers?
assessmentPrompt.en: If {{name}} is working out a real-life maths problem — like sharing 8 sweets between 2 people — can they use objects or draw a picture to show what's happening before writing any numbers?

description.it: Mostrare e raccontare come si è arrivati a una risposta matematica usando oggetti, disegni e parole
description.en: Show and tell how a mathematical answer was found using objects, drawings, and spoken words

evidence.it: Usare oggetti o disegni per mostrare come è stata risolta un'addizione o una sottrazione
evidence.en: Use objects or drawings to demonstrate how an addition or subtraction was solved

evidence.it: Rispondere alla domanda 'come lo sai?' indicando oggetti o un disegno e descrivendo ciò che è stato fatto
evidence.en: Respond to 'how do you know?' by pointing to objects or a drawing and describing what was done

evidence.it: Ascoltare la spiegazione di un compagno e dire se si è d'accordo o no
evidence.en: Listen to a peer's explanation and say whether they agree or disagree

assessmentPrompt.it: After {{name}} solves a maths problem, can they explain how they got their answer — using counters, a drawing, or words — rather than just writing down the final number?
assessmentPrompt.en: After {{name}} solves a maths problem, can they explain how they got their answer — using counters, a drawing, or words — rather than just writing down the final number?

description.it: Notare schemi e strutture semplici: accorgersi che cambiando l'ordine degli addendi il totale non cambia, e riconoscere come i numeri sono collegati tra loro
description.en: Notice simple patterns and structures: spot that changing order doesn't change the total, and recognise how numbers relate to each other

evidence.it: Notare che 3 + 2 dà lo stesso risultato di 2 + 3 (prime intuizioni sulla proprietà commutativa)
evidence.en: Notice that 3 + 2 gives the same answer as 2 + 3 (early commutativity)

evidence.it: Riconoscere che i numeri da 11 a 19 sono 'dieci e qualcosa in più' (per esempio 14 è 10 e 4)
evidence.en: Recognise that teen numbers are 'ten and some more' (e.g. 14 is 10 and 4)

evidence.it: Individuare uno schema in una sequenza di oggetti o numeri e prevedere cosa viene dopo
evidence.en: Spot a pattern in a sequence of objects or numbers and predict what comes next

assessmentPrompt.it: Has {{name}} noticed that adding numbers in a different order gives the same answer — like 3 + 5 and 5 + 3 both equal 8 — and can they explain why that makes sense?
assessmentPrompt.en: Has {{name}} noticed that adding numbers in a different order gives the same answer — like 3 + 5 and 5 + 3 both equal 8 — and can they explain why that makes sense?

name.it: Usare oggetti per modellizzare problemi reali
name.en: Using objects to model real problems

description.it: Usare oggetti, disegni o semplici espressioni numeriche per rappresentare una situazione della vita reale (primi passi nella modellizzazione matematica)
description.en: Use objects, drawings, or simple number sentences to represent a real-world situation (early mathematical modelling)

evidence.it: Fare un disegno o usare oggetti per rappresentare una semplice situazione reale che riguarda il contare o il confrontare quantità
evidence.en: Draw a picture or use objects to represent a simple real-world situation involving counting or comparing

assessmentPrompt.en: When {{name}} is practising times tables or number patterns, do they spot a shortcut — like "if 6 × 7 = 42, then 6 × 8 must be 48" — and use known facts to work out ones they haven't memorised yet?

assessmentPrompt.en: When {{name}} writes or talks about a maths answer, do they include the units — like "5 centimetres" rather than just "5" — and use the right symbols like = or <?

assessmentPrompt.en: When {{name}} notices a pattern in their maths work — like how multiplying by 10 always adds a zero — do they use that pattern to solve similar problems more quickly?

name.it: Risoluzione di problemi a più passaggi

In questa fase i bambini stanno costruendo questa abitudine con una guida costante; la capacità di valutare le strategie in autonomia arriverà più avanti.
